title: elytraria spathulifolia
intro: Elytraria spathulifolia, also known as Blue Vervain or Blue Waterleaffern, is a perennial plant species native to the southeastern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Elytraria spathulifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antispasmodic to relieve muscle cramps and spasms. Elytraria spathulifolia can be prepared as a tea by infusing its leaves in hot water, or as a tincture by steeping its leaves in a solvent such as ethanol.
